task: Docs-only design spec for Finance Hub FH-6 (Tax Manager) + FH-6a (property-tax rendition). Per-year tax register for Jorge's real list: personal property tax split across Webb County / City of Laredo / Laredo Community College / UISD (verify LISD too), Texas Franchise, Texas IRP (per-unit apportioned), IFTA (surface the existing mileage engine, don't duplicate). Each tax: amount, due date, paying account, configurable penalty-interest rate, auto-accrue penalty when overdue, auto-generate yearly (recurring). GATED posting (accrue Dr Tax Expense/Cr Tax Payable, penalty Dr Penalty Exp/Cr Payable, pay Dr Payable/Cr Cash, flag default OFF, preview-first, balance-or-fail, closed-period guard). Per-unit IRP/property splits via FH-7. FH-6a rendition pulls FH-1 asset declared values (editable per asset per year, audited) -> per-asset list submitted to taxing authorities. Data model (tax.tax_types/taxing_entities/tax_records/penalty_accruals), open questions, gated build sequence. NO code, no DDL, no posting. VOID != DELETE. Designed live with Jorge + GUARD-verifies-vs-QuickBooks before merge.
